appName.message: Bhala kabusha noma kuphi - Isibhali Kabusha sombhalo we-AI

appDesc.message: Gqamisa umbhalo noma yikuphi. Bhala kabusha ngokushesha nge-AI.

commandDesc.message: Vula iphalethi yomyalo wokubhala kabusha kwe-AI

signInText.message: Ngena ngemvume nge-Google ukuze uqale ukubhala kabusha umbhalo kunoma iyiphi iwebhusayithi nge-AI.

quickTip.message: 💡 Khetha umbhalo kunoma yiliphi ikhasi → chofoza inkinobho ✨ ukuze ubhale kabusha. Noma cindezelaCtrl+Shift+K

loginRequiredSettings.message: Sicela ungene ngemvume ukuze ubuke izilungiselelo.

noRewritesDesc.message: Gqamisa umbhalo kunoma yiliphi ikhasi bese uchofoza ✨ ukuze uqalise. Umlando wakho uzovela lapha.

deleteConfirm.message: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le nto yomlando wokubhala kabusha?

clearAllConfirm.message: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa unomphela wonke umlando wakho wokubhala kabusha? Lokhu akukwazi ukuhlehliswa.

billingHelp.message: Ukuze uthole usizo noma ukubika iphutha

freeTierDesc.message: Isigaba samahhala: 5 kubhalwa kabusha/ngosuku. Isethwa kabusha nsuku zonke phakathi kwamabili.

noLimitsTitle.message: Bhala kabusha umbhalo noma yikuphi ngaphandle kwemikhawulo.

noLimitsDesc.message: Iqoqo bhala kabusha konke okuqukethwe kwakho. Vumelanisa efwini. Ayikho imikhawulo.

earlyAdopterOffer.message: 🎁 Ukunikezwa Kwe-Adopter Yangaphambi kwesikhathi: Ukunyuka kwentengo elandelayo kubasebenzisi abangama-Premium abangu-500. Khiya kuleli zinga impilo yonke!

billingMaintenanceAlert.message: Izinkokhelo ze-US Dollar zisalungiswa okwamanje. Sicela ushintshele ohlelweni lwe-Indian Market ( ₹) noma usithinte ku-keshoraai@gmail.comukuze uthole usizo.

bestValueBadge.message: INANI ELIHLE KAHLE - IZINYANGA EZI-2 MAHHALA

pricingRating.message: ⭐ 5.0 Isilinganiso • 🔒 Vikela Izinkokhelo • ✔️ Khansela noma nini

pricingStudent.message: Ingabe ungumfundi noma umcwaningi ongakwazi ukukhokhela ukubhalisa? Sicela uthumele i-imeyili ku-keshoraai@gmail.com

freePlanLimitAlert.message: Ukuthunyelwa kwe-PDF kuphela okutholakala ohlelweni lwamahhala. Sicela uthuthukele ku-Pro/Premium ukuze uvule amanye amafomethi wokuthekelisa.

filenameFormatDesc.message: Khetha ukuthi amafayela athunyelwe aqanjwa kanjani.

cloudBackupLockedAlert.message: Ikhophi yasenqolobaneni yamafu itholakala kuphela ezinhlelweni ezikhokhelwayo. Sicela uthuthukele ku-Pro/Premium.

copySuccessAlert.message: Umlando ufomethwe kahle futhi ukopishelwe ebhodini lokunamathisela!

gdriveSuccessAlert.message: Umlando ulondolozwe ngokuvikelekile ku-Google Drive yakho!

freePlanModesAlert.message: Imodi ethi "Thuthukisa" kuphela etholakala ohlelweni lwamahhala. Sicela uthuthukele ku-Pro ukuze uvule zonke izindlela eziyi-13.

freePlanModesPopupAlert.message: Imodi ethi "Thuthukisa" kuphela etholakala ohlelweni lwamahhala. Sicela uthuthukele ku-Pro/Premium ukuze uvule wonke amamodi okubhala kabusha angu-13.

commandPalettePlaceholderPro.message: isib. Bhala kabusha i-LinkedIn, Yenza lokhu kuthandeke...

commandPaletteLockedAlert.message: Imodi ethi "Thuthukisa" kuphela etholakala ohlelweni lwamahhala. Sicela uthuthukele ku-Pro/Premium ukuze uvule zonke izici.

commandPaletteLockedModesAlert.message: Imodi ethi "Thuthukisa" kuphela etholakala ohlelweni lwamahhala. Sicela uthuthukele ku-Pro/Premium ukuze uvule wonke amamodi.

sidepanelHighlightText.message: Gqamisa umbhalo kunoma yiliphi ikhasi bese uchofoza ✨ ukuze uqalise.

faq_a_0.message: Vele ugqamise noma ukhethe noma yimuphi umbhalo kunoma yiliphi ikhasi lewebhu. Inkinobho ye-wand yomlingo entantayo ('✨') izovela ngokuzenzakalelayo eduze kwekhesa yakho. Ukuchofoza lesi sithonjana kuvula isigelekeqe sokubhala kabusha esisebenzisanayo, lapho ungakhetha khona ithoni yokubhala kabusha (njengokuthi Thuthukisa, Uhlelo Lolimi, Obuchwepheshile, Okuvamile, Nweba, noma Fushanisa) ukuze uvumele i-AI ikubhalele kabusha okuqukethwe. Ungaphinda uqalise isixhumi esibonakalayo usebenzisa isinqamuleli se-Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+Pku-Windows/Linux nomaCmd+Shift+Pku-macOS).

faq_a_1.message: Okwamanje sisekela ama-LLM asezingeni eliphezulu afaka i-OpenAI's GPT (isb., GPT-4o-mini), i-Gemini ye-Google, i-Anthropic's Claude, kanye namamodeli omthombo ovulekile we-Groq (njenge-Llama 3) okusebenza okuphezulu, ukucubungula umbhalo osheshayo.

faq_a_2.message: Yebo, ubumfihlo buyinto ebaluleke kakhulu. Sicubungula kuphela umbhalo othize owukhethele ukuwubhala kabusha. Umbhalo udluliselwa ngokuphephile ku-API yethu yasemuva ukuze senze isicelo. Asiwugcini umlando wakho werekhodi lombhalo wesikhathi eside kumaseva ethu, futhi asabelani ngawo nezinkampani zangaphandle noma siwusebenzisele ukuqeqesha amamodeli e-AI. Ukwengeza, isandiso sisebenza endaweni ene-sandbox ukuze uqinisekise ukuthi umlando wakho wokuphequlula uvikelekile.

faq_q_3.message: Uyini umehluko phakathi kwezinhlelo zamahhala nezePro?

faq_a_3.message: Uhlelo lwamahhala luhlinzeka ngokubhala kabusha okungu-5 ngosuku, kukhawulelwe kuphela kwithoni ethi 'Thuthukisa' kanye nefomethi yokulanda/yokuthekelisa ye-'PDF'. Ukuhlanganiswa kwe-Dropbox ne-Google Drayivu nakho kukhiyiwe. Izinhlelo ezikhokhelwayo (Maviki onke, I-Pro Monthly, kanye Nokugcina Kwangonyaka) zivula wonke amathoni angu-6, wonke amafomethi okulanda angu-6 (PDF, Markdown, TXT, IMG, JSON, ne-Clipboard Copy), kanye nokuhlanganiswa kwekhophi yasenqolobaneni yamafu ukuze uthole i-premium, umuzwa ongenamikhawulo.

faq_q_4.message: Kungani amathoni athile okubhala kabusha, amafomethi wokuthekelisa, nezipele zamafu kukhiyiwe ohlelweni lwamahhala?

faq_a_4.message: Ukuqalisa amamodeli e-AI yesimanje (njenge-GPT-4o-mini, i-Gemini, ne-Claude) nokuphatha ukuvumelanisa kwamafu kudinga ingqalasizinda yeseva enkulu, amandla wokubala, kanye nezindleko ze-API eziqondile kuso sonke isenzo. Ukuze senze isevisi yethu iqine kuyilapho sisanikeza inketho yamahhala esebenza ngokugcwele, icebo Lamahhala lihlanganisa izidingo eziyisisekelo (ukubhala kabusha kwansuku zonke oku-5 ngethoni ethi 'Thuthukisa' kanye nokukhiqizwa kwe-PDF kwasendaweni). Izinhlelo zokubhalisa zixhasa izindleko zamathoni e-premium (I-Grammar, Professional, Casual, Nweba, Fushanisa), izixhumi zamafu (i-Dropbox, i-Google Drayivu), kanye nokuthunyelwa kwefomethi eminingi (Markdown, TXT, IMG, JSON, COPY), ukuqinisekisa ukuthi singakwazi ukusekela ukusebenza okuphezulu, izibuyekezo ezisebenzayo, nobumfihlo obuqinile ngaphandle kwezikhangiso.

faq_a_5.message: Ngemva kokuqeda ukuthenga kwakho okubhalisele, namathisela ukhiye wakho welayisense endaweni yokuqinisekisa engukhiye ezansi kwekhasi elithi 'I-akhawunti Nokusetshenziswa' kudeshibhodi bese uchofoza okuthi 'Vula Ilayisensi'. Imininingwane yohlelo lwe-akhawunti yakho izobuyekezwa khona manjalo kusitoreji sakho sesiphequluli.

faq_q_6.message: Ingabe lokhu kusebenza ku-Google Amadokhumenti noma i-Notion?

faq_a_6.message: Yebo, isandiso sihambisana ngokugcwele nabahleli abadumile nezingosi zombhalo ezinothile njenge-Google Amadokhumenti, Notion, Gmail, LinkedIn, Slack web, kanye ne-Twitter/X. Uma inkinobho entantayo ivaliwe kuhlelo lokusebenza olungokwezifiso, ungasebenzisa isinqamuleli sekhibhodi ye-Command Palette ukuze ubhale kabusha okukhethile.

faq_a_7.message: Ukuze unikeze umuzwa ongenazihibe, we-plug-and-play, zonke izindleko zokusebenzisa i-API zimbozwe ngokugcwele ngaphansi kohlelo lwakho lokubhalisa. Okwamanje, awudingi ukumisa okhiye bakho be-API. Nokho, sihlela ukusekela ukulungiselelwa kwe-API yomsebenzisi ngokwezifiso kusibuyekezo esizayo esiqondiswe kunjiniyela.

faq_q_8.message: Ngiyishintsha kanjani ithoni yokubhala kabusha ezenzakalelayo?

faq_a_8.message: Ungasetha ithoni yakho yokubhala kabusha ezenzakalelayo kuthebhu Yezilungiselelo yale phaneli yezinketho. Ukulondoloza okuncamelayo kuzozenzakalela kuleyo toni uma uchofoza isithonjana se-magic wand, nakuba usengashintsha amathoni ku-popup uma kudingeka.

faq_q_9.message: Kungani inkinobho entantayo ingaveli ngezinye izikhathi?

faq_a_9.message: Inkinobho ye-wand yomlingo idinga ubude obuncane bokukhetha bombhalo ukuze kuvinjelwe ukumbondelana ngephutha. Ngaphezu kwalokho, izinqubomgomo zokuphepha ezijwayelekile zesiphequluli zivimba ngokuqinile imijovo yokuqukethwe kumakhasi athile akhethekile, njengeSitolo Sewebhu Se-Chrome (chrome.google.com) namakhasi okulungiselelwa kwangaphakathi (chrome://).

faq_q_10.message: Ngingakwazi ukukopisha umbhalo obhalwe kabusha ngaphandle kokufaka owokuqala?

faq_a_10.message: Yebo, ngaphakathi kwe-popup yokubhala kabusha entantayo, ungachofoza isithonjana esithi 'Kopisha'. Lokhu kukopisha inguqulo esanda kubhalwa kabusha ngqo ebhodini lakho lokunamathisela, okukuvumela ukuthi uyinamathisele noma kuphi lapho uthanda khona ngaphandle kokufaka esikhundleni noma ukuphazamisa okuqukethwe kwasekuqaleni ekhasini lewebhu.

faq_a_11.message: Ungaphatha noma ukhansele ukubhalisa kwakho nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuchofoza isixhumanisi sephothali yekhasimende esinikezwe ku-imeyili yakho yokuqinisekisa ukuthenga. Uma ungakwazi ukuyithola i-imeyili, xhumana nathi ku-keshoraai@gmail.comfuthi sizokusiza.

faq_a_12.message: Iphimbo elithi 'Nweba' lisebenzisa ubuhlakani obukhiqizayo ukwakha nokuchaza kabanzi ngombhalo wakho owukhethile, wengeze imininingwane ecebile, umongo, kanye nesakhiwo sohlelo esifanele emicabangweni emifushane, amaphuzu ezinhlamvu, noma imishwana kuyilapho ugcina inhloso yokuqala injalo.

faq_a_13.message: Yebo, siyabasekela abafundi, othisha, nabacwaningi bezemfundo. Sinikeza isaphulelo sika-30% kuzo zonke izinhlelo zokubhaliselwe okukhokhelwayo. Sithumele i-imeyili ku-keshoraai@gmail.comekhelini le-imeyili lesikole sakho noma lenyuvesi (.edu noma isizinda semfundo) ukuze ucele ikhodi yakho yesaphulelo.

faq_q_14.message: Ingabe ikhona inketho yokubhala kabusha ngobuningi?

faq_a_14.message: Yebo, abasebenzisi bezinga eliphezulu bangasebenzisa ukubhala kabusha kwenqwaba. Esikhundleni sokukhetha amasegimenti angawodwana, ungavula iphaneli eseceleni yesandiso bese unamathisele wonke amadokhumenti noma izigaba ukuze uziguqule ngesikhathi esisodwa.

faq_a_15.message: Ungathumela imibiko yeziphazamisi nge-imeyili ethimbeni lethu labasekeli ku-keshoraai@gmail.com. Ukuchofoza iwijethi yosizo kuthebhu 'I-akhawunti Nokusetshenziswa' kuzogcwalisa kusengaphambili isifanekiso sosekelo esiqukethe imininingwane yesandiso ukuze usisize sihlonze inkinga.

faq_a_16.message: Isexwayiso 'Seqiwe Isabelo-mali' sisho ukuthi usebenzise ukusetshenziswa kwakho owabelwe umjikelezo osebenzayo wohlelo lwakho: Abasebenzisi bamahhala bakhawulelwe ekubhaleni kabusha kwansuku zonke okungu-5; Abasebenzisi bamasonto onke bathola ukubhala kabusha okungu-140; Abasebenzisi benyanga bePro bathola ukubhala kabusha okungu-600; futhi Abasebenzisi be-Yearly Ultimate bathola ukubhala kabusha okungu-9,000. Izabelo zisethwa kabusha ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokususelwe kumjikelezo (nsuku zonke phakathi kwamabili ngesikhathi sasendaweni, noma emngceleni weviki/nyanga/nyanga zonke). Ungathuthukela esigabeni esiphezulu ekhasini elithi 'I-akhawunti Nokusetshenziswa' ukuze uqalise kabusha isevisi ngokushesha.
